best_unix_strategy: Use a combination of grep and sed commands to identify the start and end of the 'Authentication' section and then move it to the top level. For example: 1) Use grep with regular expressions to find the line numbers of the '### Authentication' heading and the next '###' heading. 2) Use sed to delete the identified lines and insert them after the initial '## Configuration' line.
rationale: The task requires understanding the document's hierarchical structure to accurately identify and move the 'Authentication' section and its contents. Unix line-based tools like sed and grep lack the ability to reliably parse and manipulate structured content across multiple lines and headings.
